item.ae2utility.nbt_tear_card.tooltip_al: When installed: all pattern outputs match by item type only (ignore data components).
item.ae2utility.nbt_tear_card.tooltip_wh: When installed: %s item type(s) match by item id only; others stay strict.
item.ae2utility.recipe_finder.tooltip: Right-click to search JEI recipes by mod, machine, material and output, then batch encode them.
gui.ae2utility.redstone_signal_card.hint: Emits when return-buffer output enters ME.
Emits after dispatch and stays on until outputs return to ME.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_finder.hint: Drop an item into the sample slot to narrow candidates by matching output/material types, then refine the JEI recipe list by mod, machine, material and output.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_finder.hint_compac: Left-click encodable recipes to select them, scroll to browse more.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_finder.no_results: No recipes match the current filters.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_finder.sample_hint: Place an item here to show related recipes that use it as an input or produce a similar output. Right-click to clear it.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_finder.only_encoda: Toggle whether only recipes that can be encoded right now are shown.
gui.ae2utility.pattern_provider.nbt_tear: Place the NBT Tear Card in this slot to relax NBT/data-component matching for this pattern provider.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.title: JEI Recipe Tree
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_hint: Scroll vertically; hold Ctrl + scroll to zoom in merged view; Shift + scroll horizontally; drag to pan
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_requ: Required patterns: not calculated (quantity compute off)
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_quan:
When on: show rolled-up amounts, required-pattern count, and ME pattern-exists highlighting (when expanding existing ME patterns is disabled).
When off: skip those calculations to reduce lag.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.me_pattern_ex: ME network already has a pattern for this
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_togg: Expansion for patterns already in the ME network is disabled
Expansion for patterns already in the ME network is enabled
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_enco: Encode recipes in the tree that do not yet have a matching pattern in the ME network
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_uplo: Upload tree patterns via ExtendedAE Plus (requires the mod)
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_auto: When enabled, unresolved branches that have exactly one encodable JEI recipe expand automatically. If branches that already have an ME pattern are not expanded (existing-pattern toggle off), those branches are skipped. Skipped when ingredient alternatives exist.
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_merg: Merge same-material branches per layer; hold Ctrl + scroll to zoom in merged view
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.overview_subs: Bulk encode: substitution flags apply only where AE supports them (e.g. crafting); processing patterns follow AE rules.
message.ae2utility.no_terminal_link: AE2 Utility: the current terminal is not connected to an available ME network.
message.ae2utility.no_item_inputs: AE2 Utility: this JEI recipe has no item inputs to request.
message.ae2utility.no_wireless_terminal: No usable wireless terminal was found
message.ae2utility.wireless_terminal_una: The wireless terminal is currently unavailable or disconnected
message.ae2utility.ctrl_click_to_craft: CTRL + click to craft unavailable items
message.ae2utility.filtered: AE2 Utility: these items were filtered by the terminal view cells and were not requested: %1$s
message.ae2utility.missing: AE2 Utility: missing from the ME network: %1$s
message.ae2utility.full: AE2 Utility: skipped because the terminal and player inventory are full: %1$s
message.ae2utility.bookmark_missing_inpu: Nothing to bookmark (all inputs are craftable, empty, or already bookmarked)
message.ae2utility.encode_failed_no_blan: Cannot encode: no blank pattern found in the terminal slot, inventory, or ME network.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_wrong_gu: Open recipes from a pattern encoding terminal (or ME terminal with encoding host).
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_none: No encodable recipes in this scope.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_blank_st: Batch encode stopped: not enough blank patterns in the ME network. %s recipe(s) not encoded (existing patterns were skipped automatically).
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_precheck: No usable blank patterns detected; cancelled this batch encode.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_eaep_def: EAEP provider mapping handles one Shift upload at a time. %s more recipe(s) were not queued—finish selecting a provider, then batch encode again.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_sent: Sent batch encode request for %s recipe(s) (existing patterns are skipped automatically).
message.ae2utility.recipe_tree_select_ta: Left-click + in the recipe tree first to choose the target branch.
message.ae2utility.recipe_tree_recursive: Cannot select a recipe that would create a recursion loop.
message.ae2utility.recipe_tree_opened_je: Opened the JEI recipe list. Click + to choose this child recipe.
message.ae2utility.uploads_cancelled: AE2 Utility: stopped all active batch uploads (JEI Shift queue and inventory provider writes).
message.ae2utility.uploads_stopped_by_ad: AE2 Utility: your batch uploads were forcibly stopped by a server administrator.
message.ae2utility.stopuploads_requires_: AE2 Utility: /ae2utility stopuploads can only be run by an online player (not from dedicated console alone). Use /execute as <player>.
message.ae2utility.stopuploads_all_done: AE2 Utility: forced stop batch uploads for %s online player(s).
message.ae2utility.recipe_shift_batch_ab: AE2 Utility: no ExtendedAE pattern provider grid for Shift upload; remaining batch was cancelled.
message.ae2utility.shift_batch_aborted_m: AE2 Utility: matrix rejected this JEI Shift-batch pattern (full or incompatible); encoded pattern returned to your inventory and the rest of the batch was cancelled. Try recipe-tree upload paths for pattern providers.
message.ae2utility.recipe_shift_batch_ca: AE2 Utility: this JEI Shift sequential batch was aborted on the server (see the preceding system message).
message.ae2utility.inventory_upload_prov: AE2 Utility: provider slot full or rejected; pick another pattern provider or free a slot.
AE2 Utility: ExtendedAE pattern provider is not available; inventory pattern upload stopped.
message.ae2utility.inventory_upload_reop: AE2 Utility: could not reopen the pattern provider screen; uploads stopped.
message.ae2utility.batch_encode_category: AE2 Utility: «encode whole JEI category» is disabled in mod config.
message.ae2utility.eco_pattern_duplicate: AE2 Utility: this pattern already exists in the ECO crafting system; upload cancelled.
message.ae2utility.encode_rejected_requi: AE2 Utility: this server requires an open pattern-encoding ME screen to encode (server config).
message.ae2utility.encode_rejected_full_: AE2 Utility: full JEI category (all pages) batch encoding is disabled on this server (server config).
message.ae2utility.bulk_encode_truncated: AE2 Utility: batch has %1$s patterns; processing only the first %2$s due to server cap (server config).
AE2 Utility: sending only the first %2$s of %1$s patterns (server batch cap).
message.ae2utility.bulk_encode_exceeds_s: AE2 Utility: hit the batch cap (%s patterns); further packets this session won’t encode (server config).
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_bl: Blue highlighted items can be auto-crafted.
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_ct: Ctrl+left-click: encode pattern into your inventory and bookmark inputs that lack an auto-crafting pattern.
Ctrl+Shift+left-click: Shift-upload the pattern (ExtendedAE Plus) and bookmark those inputs as above.
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_sh: Hold Shift to map/upload pattern to Provider
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.batch_encode_page: Batch encode all recipes visible on this page
jei.tooltip.ae2utility.batch_encode_cate: Batch encode all recipes in this JEI category (every page)
emi.tooltip.ae2utility.encode_pattern_bl: Blue highlighted items can be auto-crafted.
emi.tooltip.ae2utility.batch_encode_page: Batch encode every recipe on the current EMI page
emi.tooltip.ae2utility.batch_encode_cate: Batch encode all recipes in this EMI category (every page)
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.plus_hint_lef: Left click: open JEI to choose a recipe
gui.ae2utility.recipe_tree.plus_hint_rig: Right click: open the built-in candidate panel
ae2utility.config.allowJeiPatternEncodeW: Allow JEI pattern encode without opening a terminal GUI

On (default): with a wireless pattern-encoding-capable terminal in backpack/Curios, JEI encode works without opening its GUI.
Off: enable only after opening a pattern-encoding ME screen — can reduce lag.
(Client only; server policy goes in server config.)
ae2utility.config.showJeiBatchEncodeFull: Show “full category / all pages” JEI batch-encode button

On (default): show JEI overlay button to encode every recipe on every page for the selected machine category.
Off: hide it.
(Client display preference; forbid this mode in server config.)
ae2utility.config.reuseProviderWithinBat: Reuse last chosen provider within a batch session

On (default): within one batch upload session, when a search key resolves to multiple providers, reuse the previously chosen provider (matched by name) to reduce repeated popups. Matched by name against the current list, so it never uploads to the wrong place when the list order changes.
Still gated by ExtendedAE Plus's 'auto upload unique match' toggle: no auto-reuse when that toggle is off.
Off: every pattern must be chosen manually (still auto when the filter is unique).
ae2utility.serverConfig.requireOpenPatte: Require pattern-encoding ME screen — block remote JEI encode

On: encode requests without a pattern-encoding ME screen are rejected.
Off: don’t impose this restriction.
ae2utility.serverConfig.blockJeiFullCate: Forbid “full category / all pages” JEI batch encode

On: reject packets tagged as the whole JEI machine category (all pages).
Off: allow (still subject to other limits).
ae2utility.serverConfig.jeiBulkEncodeMax: Max patterns per bulk encode session ID

-1 disables this limit (no truncation, no per-session counting).
8–16384: per bulk session ID, the server encodes at most this many patterns; extras are skipped.
Shared across JEI full-category/current-page batches, Recipe Finder bulk, recipe-tree batches, etc.
ae2utility.serverConfig.enableNbtTearPro: NBT Tear blacklist: Productive Bees configurable spawn eggs

On: the NBT Tear Card never treats different Productive Bees configurable bee spawn eggs as the same item.
Off: allow the card's normal fuzzy rules.
ae2utility.serverConfig.enableNbtTearDra: NBT Tear blacklist: Draconic Evolution fusion injectors

On: the NBT Tear Card never fuzzy-matches Draconic Evolution basic, wyvern, awakened/draconic, or chaotic crafting injectors.
Off: allow the card's normal fuzzy rules.
ae2utility.serverConfig.nbtTearCardItemB: Extra item ids that the NBT Tear Card must never match by item-id-only. Built-in blacklist groups above have their own switches.
